productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Black Unisex Lug-Laptop Backpacks
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from US Polo. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space and laptop compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday wear to college or office. Measurement Height : 41cm Width : 34cm Depth : 18.5cm Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with padded laptop compartment with a buckle clasp One zippered compartment for enhanced space One small zippered compartment on the front Zippered utility pocket on the front with organizing pouches, zippered mesh pouch US Polo badge appliquéd on the front Two mesh bottle holders on the sides Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine wash, tumble dry, wring or line dry
